question: List titles of all books published by an author whose name contains the string 'Plato'?
sql: SELECT Book.Title FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name LIKE '%Plato%'

semantic.reason: 意图不一致（原始问题要求书籍标题，SQL描述目标为ISBN），过滤条件字段不匹配（原始问题应过滤Author.Name，SQL描述正确），但表关联和LIKE条件使用一致
